'''Kira Prime''' was originally the name of the second [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in the [[Kira system/Legends|Kira system]]. It was destroyed and became an asteroid belt.

==Description==
The instable asteroid field was formed out of the remnants of the planets [[Kira I]], [[Kira II|II]] and [[Kira III|III]]. While the [[Gravity well/Legends|gravity well]] of [[Kira's sun|Kira]] kept most of the asteroids contained, a few of them escaped and posed an occasional [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] hazard.<ref name="TSK" />

==History==
When an unknown cataclysm destroyed the first three planets of the Kira system, the remnants of the planets formed an unstable asteroid field around Kira, the [[Star system/Legends|system's]] sun.<ref name="TSK" />

This was discovered by a second system survey conducted several years after the first one. Further research into the cause of this event was deemed unnecessary and it remained unknown.<ref name="TSK" />

When the [[Kira Run]] was established years later, the asteroids remained a small, but constant hazard for [[Hyperspace/Legends|hyperspace]] travel.<ref name="TSK" />

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-06-XX -->[[Twin Stars of Kira (sourcebook)|''Twin Stars of Kira'']] {{1stm}}
